promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the first archived-state A2-mid follow-on because the Episode 01 working-log family is the strongest process-correction and persistence-failure lineage packet in folder order.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the reusable continuity, classification, canon-gap, survivor-bookkeeping, and migration-marker structures needed for a bounded second-pass reduction.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the Episode 01 archived process-history family was reduced into a smaller reusable packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived Episode 01 parent batch already isolated the reusable process-side lessons and live contradictions needed for this pass.

candidate_items.name: THICK_LOG_AND_FULL_SNAPSHOT_CONTINUITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest archived continuity correction without importing episode-specific theory content.

candidate_items.name: SEALED_PREFIX_AND_APPEND_ONLY_CONTINUATION_PAIR
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the pair structure itself as archived-state evidence rather than hiding the drift boundary.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_CLASSIFICATION_AND_CONTRADICTION_LAYERING_DISCIPLINE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest reusable archived-state hygiene packet from the parent family.

candidate_items.name: THIN_CANON_GAP_AND_NAMING_DEBT_CAUTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest warning against over-promoting old archived A2 reasoning into current doctrine.

candidate_items.name: CONDITIONAL_SURVIVOR_SET_NONINEVITABILITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the most reusable anti-closure lesson in the parent family's graveyard and substrate exploration.

candidate_items.name: MIGRATION_APPEND_CONTROL_CORRECTION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the highest-signal transition-governance artifact in the parent family while keeping it separate from earlier theory content.

quarantined_items.name: ROOT_CONSTRAINT_ELIMINATIONS_AS_CURRENT_ACTIVE_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Archived A2 eliminations explicitly outrun thin canon in this family and cannot be promoted as current law from here.

quarantined_items.name: DENSITY_OPERATOR_INEVITABILITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent family repeatedly preserves attraction without inevitability and keeps multiple survivor classes live.

quarantined_items.name: ARCHIVED_AXIS0_OR_THREADB_PLACEMENT_AS_CURRENT_REPO_TRUTH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Archived placement facts and old snapshot details do not automatically describe current repo truth.

quarantined_items.name: A2_PHASE_LABEL_FLATTENING
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The archive explicitly preserves different `A2` meanings as historical naming debt rather than one current-law object.

quarantined_items.name: STALE_STATE_CONTROL_MARKERS_AS_CONTEXT_FREE_PERMANENT_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The migration append is a stale-state marker and its emergency controls must remain context-bound.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent family's strongest continuity, classification, canon-gap, survivor-bookkeeping, and transition-governance lessons without re-exporting its old theory content.
They keep contradiction markers explicit while remaining proposal-side and archived-state scoped.
They remain small and reusable for later archived-state comparison work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain stale-state theory overreads, naming collapses, or historical snapshot confusions rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Kept the reduction process-side and archived-state scoped rather than exporting old theoretical content.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived Episode 01 reduction pass.
